states.name: Rizette
states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: The girl, Rizette, stood defenseless before the Supreme God. At first glance, she seemed insignificant, unworthy of notice. Her skill and magical power were impressive, yes, but nothing more than what another human could attain. Only her eyes were different—they pierced straight through evil itself.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: And so, Rizette, having caught the eye of the Supreme God, became a member of the Valkyries. In a different world, surrounded by different races, she was bewildered. Yet as she shared meals, clashed at times, and spent days together with the Valkyrie, she eventually found herself accepted as one of them.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: And so, Rizette came to understand that no matter one's race or birthplace, the desire to take up the blade to protect someone dear is the same. Now, before her lies her wounded friend. So she stands up to uphold her own justice.
